spec.name: The Butchery
spec.description: This shop has the aroma of freshly slaughterd beasts. You feel right at home. You see a fairly simple set up. The corpses... er... selections hang on hooks, still bleeding into catch pans that drain into a single underground vat. You wonder where that leads...

extra_descs.description: You think you hear noises from the vat... naaah.
